title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
author: openai-blog
raw_description: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
summary: GPT-5 Pro帮助免疫学家Derya Unutmaz解决了一个持续3年的免疫学谜题，揭示了T细胞行为的新见解，有望推动癌症和自身免疫研究。
analysis_note: 展示了LLM在科学发现中的实际价值，但技术细节有限，偏向应用案例。
